stemHtml: The following NOTAM is given: MADRID APPROACH FRQ CHNG FROM 118.400 TO CH 118.405 READ INSTEAD. What does it mean?

options.a: Madrid changed frequency from 118.405 MHz to 118.400 MHz.
options.b: Madrid is using frequency 118.400 MHz and 118.405 MHz.
options.c: Madrid changed frequency from 118.400 MHz to CHANNEL 118.400 MHz.
options.d: In order to read frequency 118.400 MHz you have to set 118.405 MHz.
